identity.name: AyuCare
identity.description: A comprehensive cloud-based Practice Management & Nutrient Analysis Software for Ayurvedic Dietitians.

scale.h1: text-4xl md:text-5xl font-serif font-bold tracking-tight text-primary-900
scale.h2: text-3xl md:text-4xl font-serif font-semibold tracking-tight text-primary-800
scale.label: text-xs font-sans font-bold uppercase tracking-wider text-stone-400

typography.instructions: Use Merriweather for all headings (h1-h3) to evoke tradition and authority. Use Manrope for all body text, UI elements, and data tables for maximum readability.

buttons.primary: bg-[#2F5233] text-white hover:bg-[#3A6647] shadow-md hover:shadow-lg transition-all duration-300 rounded-lg px-6 py-2.5 font-medium
buttons.secondary: bg-[#F2F7F4] text-[#2F5233] hover:bg-[#E1EDE5] border border-[#2F5233]/20 rounded-lg px-6 py-2.5 font-medium
buttons.outline: bg-transparent border border-[#2F5233] text-[#2F5233] hover:bg-[#2F5233] hover:text-white rounded-lg px-6 py-2.5 font-medium
buttons.ghost: bg-transparent text-[#2F5233] hover:bg-[#F2F7F4] rounded-lg px-4 py-2 font-medium

cards.base: bg-white rounded-xl border border-[#E7E5E4] shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-all duration-300 p-6

inputs.base: bg-white border border-[#E7E5E4] rounded-lg px-4 py-2.5 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#2F5233]/20 focus:border-[#2F5233] transition-all outline-none placeholder:text-stone-400

badges.base: inline-flex items-center rounded-full px-2.5 py-0.5 text-xs font-medium transition-colors focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-ring focus:ring-offset-2

textures.noise: bg-[url('https://grainy-gradients.vercel.app/noise.svg')] opacity-20 mix-blend-soft-light pointer-events-none fixed inset-0 z-50

hero_bg.alt: Ayurvedic herbs and spices flat lay

accessibility.contrast: Ensure all text meets WCAG AA standards. Use #2F5233 on #FAFAF5 for high contrast.
accessibility.focus_states: Visible focus rings using ring-2 ring-offset-2 ring-[#2F5233]
accessibility.semantic_html: Use proper heading hierarchy (h1-h6), landmarks (nav, main, aside), and button/input labels.

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. SETUP: Install 'lucide-react' and 'recharts' if not present.

2. THEME: Update 'tailwind.config.js' to use the custom color palette defined in 'colors'. Override the default shadcn variables in 'index.css' to match the earthy theme (Cream background, Green primary).
3. FONTS: Import 'Merriweather' and 'Manrope' from Google Fonts in 'index.css'. Apply 'font-serif' to headings and 'font-sans' to body.
4. LAYOUT: Create a responsive sidebar layout for the dashboard. Use the 'dashboard_consultation' image for the patient management section empty state or header.
5. COMPONENTS: Customize shadcn components to have 'rounded-xl' and soft shadows. Avoid sharp edges.
6. CHARTS: Use 'recharts' with the custom color palette (Primary Green, Secondary Gold, etc.) for nutrient analysis.
7. DATA: Ensure all interactive elements have 'data-testid' attributes.
8. MOCK DATA: Use realistic Ayurvedic data (Doshas: Vata, Pitta, Kapha) in placeholders.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients.
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur).
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: 'transition: all'. This results in breaking transforms. Always add transitions for specific interactive elements like button, input excluding transforms.
You MUST NOT center align the app container, ie do not add '.App { text-align: center; }' in the css file. This disrupts the human natural reading flow of text.
Always use modern button styles like pill-shaped, or sharp button with interaction animations & color relevant to the app style.
NEVER: use AI assistant Emoji characters like 🤖🧠💭💡🔮🎯📚🎭🎬🎪🎉🎊🎁🎀🎂🍰🎈🎨🎰💰💵💳🏦💎🪙💸🤑📊📈📉💹🔢🏆🥇 etc for icons.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions, parallax effects, and entrance animations. Static = dead.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable. Cramped designs look cheap.
Subtle grain textures, noise overlays, custom cursors, selection states, and loading animations: separates good from extraordinary.
Main agent relies on these image URLs. Missing categories (especially sponsor logos) = main agent will use placeholder text which is FORBIDDEN.
Prioritize using pre-existing components from src/components/ui when applicable.
Create new components that match the style and conventions of existing components when needed.
Examine existing components to understand the project's component patterns before creating new ones.
Components MUST use named exports (export const ComponentName = ...).
Pages MUST use default exports (export default function PageName() {...}).
Use 'sonner' for toasts. Sonner component are located in '/app/src/components/ui/sonner.tsx'.
